description: Modify a single point by ID.

keywords.name: group
keywords.description: Assign the group name s1 in slot s2 (if supplied) to the point. The point is removed from the group/slot if remove is present. If the slot keyword is omitted, the slot is set to the slot named Default .

keywords.name: merge
keywords.description: Merge the point with point i2 (point ID positive integer).

keywords.name: move-to
keywords.description: Moves the point to location v , 2D coordinate vector ( \(x,y\) ). If supplied, merge-tolerance f will be used as a tolerance for merging points during moving.
